tools.name: search_tools
tools.title: Search Available Tools
tools.description: Search for tools that can help with a given task. Returns a ranked list of matching tools with their name, description, and inputSchema. Call this before invoke_tool.

query.description: Natural language description of what you want to accomplish

limit.description: Maximum number of tools to return (default 10, max 50)

tools.name: invoke_tool
tools.title: Invoke a Tool
tools.description: Invoke a specific tool by its exact name with the provided arguments. Use search_tools first to find the tool name and its inputSchema.

tool_name.description: Exact tool name returned by search_tools

arguments.description: Tool arguments as defined in the tool's inputSchema
